Home / About Us
Who We Are

About Volcano Arts Center

A cultural and creative hub located near Volcanoes National Park, empowering communities through art and tourism since 2012.

Our Story

Built on Authentic Connection

Founded in 2012 in Musanze District, Northern Province, Volcano Arts Center Inc was born from the conviction that tourism should directly benefit the communities it touches. We collaborate closely with local artists, performers, guides, and youth, ensuring that tourism creates real, sustainable impact.

Through our arts center and cultural programs, we provide a platform for local talent to showcase their work, generate income, and preserve cultural heritage in a meaningful and modern way.

Our mission is to empower women and youth with sustainable creative skills through art and tourism by creating opportunities that preserve cultural heritage, support local livelihoods, and foster genuine connections between visitors and the people they meet.

🌋

Musanze, Kinigi Road

Near Volcanoes National Park

Our Structure

7 Departments, One United Mission

Each department plays a critical role in our ecosystem of art, culture, community, and tourism.

🎭

1. Arts & Cultural Center

The creative heart of the company, focusing on showcasing, curating, and promoting Rwandan art and culture. Supports local artists by providing exhibitions, sales platforms, and cultural experiences including storytelling and visual arts.

🌍

2. Community-Based Tourism & Visitor Experiences

Designs and delivers authentic cultural tourism experiences — village walking, biking, authentic traditional weddings, and cultural tours that connect visitors with Rwandan culture around Volcanoes National Park.

🌱

3. Environmental Conservation Initiative

Focuses on environmental awareness, conservation education, and community engagement. Promotes sustainable tourism practices and protects nature and biodiversity for future generations.

💃

4. Talent Development & Media

Trains and supports youth, single mothers, persons with disabilities, and elderly community members through traditional dance and cultural performance development.

🧭

5. Tour Operations & Guest Coordination

Manages visitor logistics, tour coordination, and experience planning. Ensures smooth communication between guests, guides, and community experiences.

🤝

6. Partnerships & Business Development

Builds relationships with tour companies, hotels, NGOs, cultural institutions, and international partners to expand reach and strategic growth globally.

✋

7. Artisan & Community Empowerment Program

Supports local artisans, craftspeople, and community members with training, income opportunities, and access to markets through fair-trade practices.

Work With Us

Partner With Volcano Arts Center

Whether you're a tour operator, hotel, NGO, or cultural institution — we're always looking for meaningful partnerships.
